summary: Raw mono audience tape delivers crisp sound and a legendary Dark Star / Spanish Jam / Lovelight sequence with stellar guest musicians.
review: The audience recording, despite being mono, is surprisingly clear and crunchy, letting listeners hear the all‑star lineup of Peter Green, Gregg & Duane Allman, Danny Kirwan, Butch Trucks and Berry Oakley lock in on the epic Dark Star jam. Reviewers rave about the powerful Dark Star/Lovelight performance and even note a thrilling Quick & the Dead moment, making this a must‑download for fans.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are strongly positive (4–5 stars) and highlight both an outstanding performance (especially Dark Star/Lovelight) and a good‑quality mono audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mono audience tape with raw, crunchy sound; surprisingly clear despite limited fidelity and missing the opening NFA/Cumberland tracks.

show_quality.setlist_flow: High‑energy second set centered on an extended Dark Star/Jam sequence; guests add excitement, though early songs like Not Fade Away and Cumberland are absent from this recording.
